lead_signal.headline: US President Trump claims major military successes against Iran including destruction of navy and air force amid ongoing war now in its 33rd day.

conflict_updates.title: Trump announces destruction of Iranian navy and air force

weekly_brief_narrative: US President Trump's claim of destroying Iran's navy, air force, and decimating the IRGC marks the week's dominant signal, indicating potential direct escalation in the Iran theatre from shadow war to overt kinetic operations. This Assessed development, sourced from a single Tier 2 outlet quoting a presidential address, overrides stable patterns elsewhere due to its implications for regional posture and global security architecture uncertainty, including NATO strains. Russia-Ukraine maintains stable trajectory with academic focus on NATO expansion debates and Trump-Witkoff framework, but no kinetic shifts; I5 de-escalation from US channel de-weighting. Gaza sees episodic Qatar/Egypt mediation amid urban warfare baseline. Sudan stalemate entrenches I6 displacement without new flows. Myanmar junta fragmentation stable, coverage lagged. DRC M23 mineral coercion persists as I4 vector. Iran leads with I2 surge pending confirmation. Displacement remains acute in Sudan (I6=5) and Gaza (I6=5), with IDMC Jan reset holding; no velocity spikes. Watch Iran for Tier 1/ISW confirmation of US claims, Russia-Ukraine for ceasefire framework progress, Sudan/Myanmar/DRC for ACLED fatality updates, and Haiti for 80% Port-au-Prince gang threshold.
